name: slint
description: Slint is a declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, JavaScript, or Python apps.

accessibility.description: Enable integration with operating system provided accessibility APIs

backend-linuxkms.description: Enable the backend that renders a single window fullscreen on Linux using libseat. Requires libseat to be installed on the system.

backend-linuxkms-noseat.description: Enable the backend that renders a single window fullscreen on Linux without libseat

backend-qt.description: Enable the Qt based rendering backend. Requires Qt 5.15+ or 6.2+ to be separately installed and discoverable via CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH; not provided by this port and not covered by the vendored offline build.

backend-winit.description: Enable support for the winit crate to interact with all windowing systems

backend-winit-wayland.description: Enable support for the winit crate to interact only with the Wayland windowing system on Unix

backend-winit-x11.description: Enable support for the winit crate to interact only with the X11 windowing system on Unix

experimental.description: Enable experimental Slint features (no backward compatibility guarantees)

gettext.description: Enable support for translations using gettext. Requires gettext to be installed on the system; not provided by this port.

interpreter.description: Enable support for the Slint interpreter to load .slint files at run-time

live-preview.description: Enable support for the Slint live-preview to re-load changed .slint files at run-time (requires interpreter)

mcp.description: Enable the embedded MCP server for AI-assisted debugging

renderer-femtovg.description: Enable the OpenGL ES 2.0 based FemtoVG rendering engine

renderer-femtovg-wgpu.description: Enable the WGPU based FemtoVG rendering engine

renderer-skia.description: Enable the Skia based rendering engine. Skia is fetched by the skia-safe Rust crate's own build script (typically a prebuilt binary download), independently of this port's vendored-crates offline build; expect this feature to require network access.

renderer-skia-opengl.description: Enable the Skia rendering engine with its OpenGL backend (see renderer-skia caveats)

renderer-skia-vulkan.description: Enable the Skia rendering engine with its Vulkan backend (see renderer-skia caveats)

sdf-fonts.description: Enable support for pre-rendering fonts as Signed Distance Fields (for the software renderer)

software-renderer-path.description: Enable Path element rendering with the software renderer

system-testing.description: Enable support for controlling the application from a system testing tool

testing.description: Enable support for the Slint testing API (experimental)
